fields.name: event_key
fields.label: Event Key
fields.description: Secret key guests need in the URL hash to view this page

fields.name: timezone
fields.label: Timezone
fields.description: IANA timezone name, e.g. America/Chicago — used to display dates correctly

fields.name: emoji
fields.label: Hero Emoji
fields.description: Displayed large at the top when no cover image is set

fields.name: cover_image
fields.label: Cover Image (optional)
fields.description: Full-bleed hero image; overrides the emoji hero when set

fields.name: location_url
fields.label: Location URL (optional)
fields.description: Google Maps link or any URL — makes the location text a link

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date (ISO UTC)
fields.description: e.g. 2026-07-12T21:00:00Z — display is auto-formatted from this using the event timezone

fields.name: duration_hours
fields.label: Duration (hours)
fields.description: How long the event runs — defaults to 2 if not set. Used for calendar download.

fields.name: note
fields.label: Note (optional)
fields.description: Small italic note shown under this date (e.g. 'runs until 8 pm', 'venue may change')

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
